name: CervicalCancerDAK
title: WHO SMART DAK — Cervical Cancer Screening (L2)
description: Layer 2 (decision logic) artifacts for cervical cancer screening, Algorithm 5 (HPV DNA primary with VIA triage), authored using a textualist/purposive methodology with an interpretation register. L3 (FHIR profiles, CQL, terminology bindings) not yet authored.
